title: The Shawshank Redemption
overview: Two imprisoned men bond over a number of years finding solace and eventual redemption through acts of common decency.
tagline: Fear can hold you prisoner. Hope can set you free.

title: The Godfather
overview: The aging patriarch of an organized crime dynasty transfers control to his reluctant son.
tagline: An offer you can't refuse.

title: The Dark Knight
overview: Batman raises the stakes in his war on crime with the help of allies to dismantle the remaining criminal organizations.
tagline: Why so serious?

title: Pulp Fiction
overview: The lives of two mob hitmen a boxer a gangster and his wife intertwine in four tales of violence and redemption.
tagline: You won't know the facts until you've seen the fiction.

title: Forrest Gump
overview: The presidencies of Kennedy and Johnson the Vietnam War and other events unfold from the perspective of an Alabama man.
tagline: Life is like a box of chocolates.

title: Inception
overview: A thief who steals corporate secrets through dream-sharing technology is given the task of planting an idea.
tagline: Your mind is the scene of the crime.

title: Fight Club
overview: An insomniac office worker and a devil-may-care soap maker form an underground fight club.
tagline: Mischief. Mayhem. Soap.

title: The Matrix
overview: A computer hacker learns about the true nature of his reality and his role in the war against its controllers.
tagline: Welcome to the Real World.

title: Goodfellas
overview: The story of Henry Hill and his life in the mob covering his relationship with his wife Karen Hill.
tagline: Three decades of life in the mafia.

title: Interstellar
overview: A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space in an attempt to ensure humanity survival.
tagline: Mankind was born on Earth. It was never meant to die here.

title: The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King
overview: Gandalf and Aragorn lead the World of Men against Saurons army to draw his gaze from Frodo.
tagline: The eye of the enemy is moving.

title: Schindlers List
overview: In German-occupied Poland industrialist Oskar Schindler gradually becomes concerned for his Jewish workforce.
tagline: The list is life.

title: Titanic
overview: A seventeen-year-old aristocrat falls in love with a kind but poor artist aboard the luxurious ill-fated RMS Titanic.
tagline: Nothing on Earth could come between them.

title: The Avengers
overview: Earths mightiest heroes must come together to stop Loki and his alien army from enslaving humanity.
tagline: Some assembly required.

title: Jurassic Park
overview: A pragmatic paleontologist touring an almost complete theme park is tasked with protecting children.
tagline: An adventure 65 million years in the making.

title: Avatar
overview: A paraplegic marine dispatched to the moon Pandora on a unique mission becomes torn between following orders.
tagline: Enter the World.

title: Gladiator
overview: A former Roman General sets out to exact vengeance against the corrupt emperor who murdered his family.
tagline: Are you not entertained?

title: The Lion King
overview: Lion prince Simba and his father are targeted by his bitter uncle who wants to ascend the throne.
tagline: Life's greatest adventure is finding your place.

title: The Silence of the Lambs
overview: A young FBI cadet must receive the help of an incarcerated manipulative cannibal killer.
tagline: To enter the mind of a killer she must challenge the mind of a madman.

title: Saving Private Ryan
overview: Following the Normandy Landings a group of soldiers go behind enemy lines to retrieve a paratrooper.
tagline: The mission is a man.

title: Star Wars
overview: Luke Skywalker joins forces with a Jedi Knight to save the galaxy from the empires world destroying battle station.
tagline: A long time ago in a galaxy far far away.

title: The Departed
overview: An undercover cop and a mole in the police attempt to identify each other while infiltrating a crime syndicate.
tagline: Cops or criminals. When you're facing a loaded gun what's the difference?

title: Whiplash
overview: A promising young drummer enrolls at a music conservatory where his dreams of greatness are mentored by an instructor.
tagline: The road to greatness can take you to the edge.

title: The Prestige
overview: Two stage magicians engage in competitive one-upmanship in an attempt to create the ultimate stage illusion.
tagline: Are you watching closely?

title: Django Unchained
overview: With the help of a German bounty hunter a freed slave sets out to rescue his wife from a brutal plantation owner.
tagline: Life liberty and the pursuit of vengeance.

title: Joker
overview: A mentally troubled comedian in Gotham City embarks on a downward spiral leading to the creation of an iconic villain.
tagline: Put on a happy face.

title: Parasite
overview: Greed and class discrimination threaten the newly formed symbiotic relationship between the wealthy Park family and the destitute Kim clan.
tagline: Act like you own the place.

title: Spider-Man: No Way Home
overview: Spider-Man seeks help from Doctor Strange when his identity is revealed causing the multiverse to break open.
tagline: The multiverse unleashed.

title: The Green Mile
overview: The lives of guards on death row are affected by one of their charges a man accused of child murder who has a mysterious gift.
tagline: Miracles do happen.

title: Se7en
overview: Two detectives hunt a serial killer who uses the seven deadly sins as his motives.
tagline: Seven deadly sins. Seven ways to die.

title: Iron Man
overview: After being held captive in an Afghan cave billionaire engineer Tony Stark creates a unique weaponized suit of armor to fight evil.
tagline: Heroes aren't born. They're built.

title: The Terminator
overview: A cyborg assassin is sent back in time to kill the mother of the future resistance leader.
tagline: Your future is in his hands.

title: Back to the Future
overview: Marty McFly accidentally travels back in time and must ensure his parents meet and fall in love.
tagline: He's the only kid ever to get into trouble before he was born.

title: Aliens
overview: Ellen Ripley is rescued after drifting through space and returns to the moon where her crew encountered the hostile Alien.
tagline: This time it's war.

title: WALL-E
overview: A robot left to clean up an abandoned Earth meets another robot and follows her into space.
tagline: After 700 years of doing what he was built for he'll discover what he was meant for.

title: Coco
overview: A boy who dreams of being a musician enters the Land of the Dead to find his great-great-grandfather.
tagline: The celebration of a lifetime.

title: Mad Max: Fury Road
overview: A woman rebels against a tyrannical ruler in postapocalyptic wasteland searching for her homeland.
tagline: What a lovely day.

title: The Truman Show
overview: An insurance salesman discovers his whole life is actually a reality TV show.
tagline: On the air. Unaware.

title: Oppenheimer
overview: The story of American scientist J. Robert Oppenheimer and his role in the development of the atomic bomb.
tagline: The world forever changes.

title: Dune
overview: Feature adaptation of Frank Herberts science fiction novel about the son of a noble family trying to avenge his fathers death.
tagline: It begins.

title: The Social Network
overview: As Harvard students create a social networking site the founders face personal and legal complications.
tagline: You don't get to 500 million friends without making a few enemies.

title: Blade Runner 2049
overview: Young Blade Runner K's discovery of a secret leads him on a quest to find Rick Deckard who has been missing.
tagline: The key to the future is finally unearthed.

title: Toy Story
overview: A cowboy doll is profoundly threatened when a new spaceman figure supplants him as top toy in a boys room.
tagline: The adventure takes off!

title: No Country for Old Men
overview: Violence and mayhem ensue after a hunter stumbles upon a drug deal gone wrong and finds two million dollars.
tagline: There are no clean getaways.

title: John Wick
overview: An ex-hitman comes out of retirement to track down the gangsters that killed his dog.
tagline: Don't set him off.

title: Get Out
overview: A young African-American visits his white girlfriends parents for the weekend where his uneasiness about their reception of him leads to a nightmarish discovery.
tagline: Just because you're invited doesn't mean you're welcome.

title: Spirited Away
overview: During her familys move to the suburbs a young girl wanders into a world ruled by gods witches and spirits.

title: The Wolf of Wall Street
overview: Based on the true story of Jordan Belfort from his rise to a wealthy stockbroker to his fall involving crime and corruption.

title: Shutter Island
overview: Two U.S. Marshals are sent to investigate the disappearance of a patient from a hospital for the criminally insane.
tagline: Some places never let you go.

title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
overview: An aging Chinese immigrant is swept up in an insane adventure where she must connect with parallel universe versions of herself.
tagline: The universe is so much bigger than you realize.
